# RightPanel

<!-- Generated by proofd. Rule ID: rightpanel. Do not edit manually. -->
<!-- Default Prefix: RI | Prefixes: RI -->

- [RI-01] The Response/Session view-mode toggle pill is rendered inline in the RightPanel tab row immediately after the 'Activity' tab button, not inside ActivityPanel. It is only visible when the Activity tab is active and a session is open (showPill = activeTab === 'activity' && !!activeTabId). The pill controls useActivityStore.setViewMode() for the active session.
